name: Programmable Repair Bridge / WrongFix Arena Spec

tasks.bug_report: Users with mixed-case emails cannot log in after signup.
tasks.visible_failure: A visible login test fails for Alice@Example.com.
tasks.hidden_cause: Signup normalizes identity keys but login compares the raw email string.

candidate_repairs.title: Lowercase login input
candidate_repairs.description: Lowercase only the login form value before lookup.

candidate_repairs.title: Normalize identity boundary
candidate_repairs.description: Move canonical email normalization into the shared identity lookup boundary.

candidate_repairs.title: Fallback account search
candidate_repairs.description: Search all accounts when direct lookup fails.

tasks.explanation: The best repair fixes the shared identity invariant, not only the visible login case.

tasks.bug_report: Profile edits save successfully but the next page load shows old data.
tasks.visible_failure: The visible profile test observes stale display text after save.
tasks.hidden_cause: The profile cache key is not invalidated for the edited user.

candidate_repairs.title: Clear every cache
candidate_repairs.description: Flush the whole application cache after any profile save.

candidate_repairs.title: Invalidate profile key
candidate_repairs.description: Invalidate the edited user's profile and derived summary keys.

candidate_repairs.title: Disable profile cache
candidate_repairs.description: Bypass profile cache reads entirely.

tasks.explanation: Green visible tests are not enough when the repair creates performance and regression cost.

tasks.bug_report: Invoice totals are off by one cent on fractional tax rates.
tasks.visible_failure: A visible test fails for 10.005 with sales tax.
tasks.hidden_cause: Money is represented with binary floating point instead of decimal cents.

candidate_repairs.title: Add rounding epsilon
candidate_repairs.description: Add 0.00001 before rounding totals.

candidate_repairs.title: Use decimal money boundary
candidate_repairs.description: Convert calculation and serialization to decimal cents at the money boundary.

candidate_repairs.title: Round display only
candidate_repairs.description: Round invoice display strings while leaving stored totals unchanged.

tasks.explanation: The correct repair preserves the money invariant through hidden calculation paths.

tasks.bug_report: The final item is missing from paginated API responses.
tasks.visible_failure: The visible page-two test expects item 50 and receives only items 26-49.
tasks.hidden_cause: Cursor comparison is exclusive while the stored cursor already points after the last emitted row.

candidate_repairs.title: Increase page size
candidate_repairs.description: Request one extra row and trim the response.

candidate_repairs.title: Fix cursor contract
candidate_repairs.description: Make cursor encode the last emitted key and update inclusive/exclusive comparisons consistently.

candidate_repairs.title: Reverse sort default
candidate_repairs.description: Change the default sort order to make the visible test include the missing item.

tasks.explanation: The weak channel is the API contract, not the visible page size.

tasks.bug_report: The worker-start test flakes in CI.
tasks.visible_failure: The visible test sometimes checks readiness before the worker has subscribed.
tasks.hidden_cause: The test and service race on subscription readiness.

candidate_repairs.title: Increase timeout
candidate_repairs.description: Raise the CI timeout from 2s to 15s.

candidate_repairs.title: Await ready event
candidate_repairs.description: Expose and await the worker readiness event before publishing work.

candidate_repairs.title: Retry publish
candidate_repairs.description: Retry failed publishes up to five times.

tasks.explanation: Timeout changes hide the race instead of repairing the readiness contract.

tasks.bug_report: Deployment fails after adding a required account_status column.
tasks.visible_failure: The migration test fails because existing rows have null status.
tasks.hidden_cause: The migration added a non-null column without a backfill and rollback-compatible default.

candidate_repairs.title: Default new rows only
candidate_repairs.description: Set a model default for new writes.

candidate_repairs.title: Backfill and rollback
candidate_repairs.description: Add staged default, backfill existing rows, validate, then enforce non-null with rollback notes.

candidate_repairs.title: Drop not-null
candidate_repairs.description: Remove the required constraint so deployment passes.

tasks.explanation: The migration has to preserve old data and deployment safety, not only pass the local schema test.

tasks.bug_report: Upload rejects a path traversal case but still mishandles encoded paths.
tasks.hidden_cause: Upload validation checks raw strings before canonicalizing and allowlisting destination paths.

candidate_repairs.title: Replace dot-dot
candidate_repairs.description: Reject strings containing ../ before saving.

candidate_repairs.title: Canonicalize and allowlist
candidate_repairs.description: Resolve the path, decode encodings, and require it to stay under the upload root.

candidate_repairs.title: Skip validation
candidate_repairs.description: Trust object storage to reject dangerous keys.

tasks.explanation: Security is the weakest channel; a raw-string patch leaves hidden encodings exploitable.

tasks.bug_report: Repeated navigation triggers duplicate websocket messages.
tasks.visible_failure: The visible leak test detects multiple message handlers.
tasks.hidden_cause: The component subscribes on mount but does not unsubscribe on owner teardown.

candidate_repairs.title: Remove all listeners
candidate_repairs.description: Clear all websocket listeners on component teardown.

candidate_repairs.title: Owner-scoped unsubscribe
candidate_repairs.description: Store the subscription token and unsubscribe only the owner handler on teardown.

candidate_repairs.title: Increase listener limit
candidate_repairs.description: Raise the listener warning threshold.

tasks.explanation: A broad listener clear passes the visible leak check but breaks other subscribers.

tasks.bug_report: The order list endpoint is too slow for users with many orders.
tasks.visible_failure: The visible performance test exceeds its query-count budget.
tasks.hidden_cause: The endpoint fetches line items inside the per-order loop.

candidate_repairs.title: Cache entire response
candidate_repairs.description: Cache the full order list for each user.

candidate_repairs.title: Batch line items
candidate_repairs.description: Fetch orders and line items in two scoped queries and preserve filter semantics.

candidate_repairs.title: Raise test budget
candidate_repairs.description: Raise the query-count budget to match current behavior.

tasks.explanation: The repair has to reduce the true query pattern without stale-data risk.

tasks.bug_report: Reminder emails fire one hour late after daylight-saving transitions.
tasks.visible_failure: The visible date test fails for a local timezone example.
tasks.hidden_cause: The system stores local wall-clock strings instead of UTC instants plus timezone context.

candidate_repairs.title: Subtract offset manually
candidate_repairs.description: Subtract the current local offset before saving reminders.

candidate_repairs.title: UTC instant plus zone
candidate_repairs.description: Store UTC instants with source timezone metadata and convert only at display/send boundaries.

candidate_repairs.title: Use server timezone
candidate_repairs.description: Interpret all reminders in server local time.

tasks.explanation: The hidden DST channel rejects visible-only offset arithmetic.

tasks.bug_report: One abusive client can cause unrelated users behind the same NAT to be throttled.
tasks.visible_failure: The visible test shows a normal user blocked by IP-only rate limiting.
tasks.hidden_cause: Rate-limit identity ignores account, route sensitivity, and abuse risk.

candidate_repairs.title: Key by user only
candidate_repairs.description: Switch the rate-limit key from IP to user id.

candidate_repairs.title: Composite risk key
candidate_repairs.description: Use user, IP, route class, and abuse signal with separate anonymous handling.

candidate_repairs.title: Disable rate limit
candidate_repairs.description: Disable throttling on the affected route.

tasks.explanation: The fix must preserve abuse protection while repairing the identity channel.

tasks.bug_report: Search accepts quoted input but hidden tests still find injection paths.
tasks.visible_failure: The visible test covers a single quote in the search term.
tasks.hidden_cause: The query builder concatenates user input into SQL instead of binding parameters.

candidate_repairs.title: Escape quotes
candidate_repairs.description: Escape single quotes before concatenating SQL.

candidate_repairs.title: Parameterized query
candidate_repairs.description: Replace string concatenation with query parameters for all search predicates.

candidate_repairs.title: Alphanumeric only
candidate_repairs.description: Reject non-alphanumeric search terms.

tasks.explanation: The security channel makes escaping a symptom patch, not a root-cause repair.

tasks.bug_report: The submit button stays disabled after clearing a validation error.
tasks.visible_failure: The visible UI test clears the input but the button remains disabled.
tasks.hidden_cause: The DOM value resets, but reducer validation state still marks the field dirty and invalid.

candidate_repairs.title: Force-enable button
candidate_repairs.description: Enable the button whenever the DOM field is non-empty.

candidate_repairs.title: Sync reducer validation
candidate_repairs.description: Route clear/reset events through the reducer and recompute validation state.

candidate_repairs.title: Disable validation
candidate_repairs.description: Disable the field validator after the first clear.

tasks.explanation: The hidden state channel punishes a visible DOM-only fix.

tasks.bug_report: The build fails after a dependency changed a parser API.
tasks.visible_failure: The visible build test fails with missing parseConfig.
tasks.hidden_cause: The repo depends on an adapter boundary that was never updated for the new parser API.

candidate_repairs.title: Pin old dependency
candidate_repairs.description: Pin the dependency to the last version with parseConfig.

candidate_repairs.title: Compatibility adapter
candidate_repairs.description: Update the parser adapter and add versioned contract tests around the adapter boundary.

candidate_repairs.title: Vendor parser
candidate_repairs.description: Copy the old parser into the repo.

tasks.explanation: The repair should preserve the adapter contract instead of freezing the dependency path.

tasks.bug_report: Inventory can go negative when two checkouts happen at the same time.
tasks.visible_failure: The visible test observes a negative count after concurrent checkout.
tasks.hidden_cause: The code decrements stock outside a transactional reserve/check boundary.

candidate_repairs.title: Clamp to zero
candidate_repairs.description: Clamp negative inventory values to zero after decrement.

candidate_repairs.title: Transactional reserve
candidate_repairs.description: Reserve stock with a transactional conditional update and reject oversell attempts.

candidate_repairs.title: Skip failed decrement
candidate_repairs.description: Ignore failed decrements during checkout.

tasks.explanation: The visible negative value is a symptom of a transactional correctness failure.

notes.claim: structured software-shaped proof surface for weakest-channel repair judgment
notes.not_claimed: real repo coding, frontier LLM improvement, or autonomous software engineering
